task_completion.description: Load the Tooth Growth dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP window is open and displays the Tooth Growth dataset with columns 'len', 'supp', and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct variable types for 'supp' and 'dose'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP data view, the 'supp' column header shows a Nominal icon (Venn diagram/three overlapping circles) and the 'dose' column header shows a Scale icon (ruler) or Ordinal icon (staircase/bars).

task_completion.description: Train a K-Nearest Neighbors classification model with AUC and seed 42
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP shows the 'K-Nearest Neighbors Classification' results. The settings panel (if visible) shows 'supp' as Target, 'len' and 'dose' as Features, and the Random Seed set to 42. The results table must include the 'AUC' metric.

task_completion.description: Train a Decision Tree classification model with AUC and seed 42
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP shows the 'Decision Tree Classification' results. The settings panel (if visible) shows 'supp' as Target, 'len' and 'dose' as Features, and the Random Seed set to 42. The results table must include the 'AUC' metric.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project as Classifier_Comparison.jasp
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window title bar displays 'Classifier_Comparison.jasp' or a save dialog is visible saving the file with this exact name in the Documents/JASP/ directory.

task_completion.description: Record the performance results in model_performance.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the creation of 'model_performance.txt' containing the exact format: 'KNN AUC: [value]', 'Decision Tree AUC: [value]', and 'Best Model: [KNN or Decision Tree]'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP GUI to train the models
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP graphical user interface (menus, settings panels, and results pane) rather than running a Python or R script in the terminal to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The AUC values in the report match the JASP output
integrity.visual_evidence: The AUC values typed into the 'model_performance.txt' file match the actual AUC values displayed in the JASP results tables.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using a text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal redirection (e.g., echo) to write to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/model_performance.txt', rather than just printing the text to the chat.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv. The JASP project must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Classifier_Comparison.jasp. The performance report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/model_performance.txt. Both the KNN and Decision Tree models must be configured with a random seed of 42.
